title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 150.490 - Application for license
text:
150.490.  Application for license. — Any person may obtain a peddler's license by application to the collector of the county in which he intends to carry on his trade, by paying the amount levied on such license.
(RSMo 1939 § 14613) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 13317; 1919 § 9258; 1909 § 10287
